duplicates.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Diy Electronics Repair Signals Consumer Tech Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly surge in google trends searches for diy electronics repair signals bullish xlk

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Diy Electronics Repair Signals Consumer Tech Stress
idea.thesis: Rising DIY electronics repair searches indicate consumers delaying professional repairs, signaling cost-conscious behavior. Consumer tech services and retailers may see pressure as users self-serve repairs.
idea.signal_logic: If weekly searches rise 20% above prior 4-week average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If weekly searches rise 20% above prior 4-week average Exit: When searches fall below 10% above prior 4-week average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY consumer behavior shifts often trend seasonally or after new product launches.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'DIY electronics repair' signals consumer tech stress
schema.behavior: Rising DIY electronics repair searches indicate consumers delaying professional repairs, signaling cost-conscious behavior.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer tech services and retailers may see pressure as users self-serve repairs.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches rise 20% above prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: When searches fall below 10% above prior 4-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY consumer behavior shifts often trend seasonally or after new product launches.

duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends Searches For Emergency Car Battery Replacement Signals Auto Repair Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends searches for emergency car battery replacement signals consumer stress impacting discretionary

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends Searches For Emergency Car Battery Replacement Signals Auto Repair Stress
idea.thesis: Spikes in emergency car battery replacement searches indicate urgent vehicle maintenance demand impacting consumer discretionary. Auto parts and repair services benefit from increased urgent maintenance searches.
idea.signal_logic: If daily searches exceed prior 7-day average by 30%
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If daily searches exceed prior 7-day average by 30% Exit: Once daily searches drop below 10% above prior 7-day average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle maintenance issues frequently spike due to weather or seasonal demands.

schema.idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'emergency car battery replacement' signals auto repair stress
schema.behavior: Spikes in emergency car battery replacement searches indicate urgent vehicle maintenance demand impacting consumer discretionary.

market_impact.rationale: Auto parts and repair services benefit from increased urgent maintenance searches.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches exceed prior 7-day average by 30%
trade_logic.exit: Once daily searches drop below 10% above prior 7-day average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle maintenance issues frequently spike due to weather or seasonal demands.
